PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leslie Donaldson in Propria Persona. Craig Donaldson appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Ms. Donaldson explained that their intent is to keep real property, live in it, and eventually pass it on to her brother's son. Ms. Donaldson also explained her understanding of what steps need to be taken to administer the estate and why they preferred not to hire counsel. Mr. Donaldson stated that he agrees 100% with what his sister stated. In addition Ms. Donaldson stated that she is waiting to receive something from a descendant of one of the witnesses and that she will file it. The petition for probate of will and letters testamentary was taken under submission. The court advised the parties that if it decides to continue the matter, they will be advised and may be required to bring counsel.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
